title: Main Story Walkthrough
author: Fextralife
attribution: This walkthrough was pulled from Fextralife (fextralife.com) and processed for a cleaner reading experience. All credit for the original content goes to the Fextralife community.

steps.text: Pick up the **Dungeon Cell Key** from the corpse near the starting cell.
steps.note: It's on the body right next to where you start.

steps.text: Unlock the cell door and head upstairs.
Pick up the **Straight Sword Hilt** from the corpse on the steps.
steps.note: Missable if you rush past — it's on the right side of the staircase.

steps.text: Grab the **Estus Flask** from the altar in the large room.
Do NOT fight the Asylum Demon head-on your first encounter. Run past it through the fog gate on the left.
steps.note: You can come back to fight it properly after getting your starting weapon.

steps.text: Drop down to the fog gate room and pick up your **starting gift** and **Humanity** if applicable.
**BOSS: Asylum Demon** — Attack from behind after the plunge attack. Use the plunging attack from the ledge for massive damage.
Use the Big Pilgrim's Key to exit the Asylum. Watch the cutscene.
Talk to **Kingseeker Frampt** (if he appears) — not required, just lore.
Grab the **Humanity** and **Twin Humanities** from the corpses near the well.
steps.note: One is by the well, the other is behind the well arch.

steps.text: Firelink Shrine is your main hub. You can warp back here by resting at the bonfire.
steps.note: The NPC Anastacia of Astora is imprisoned below the bonfire — she is the Fire Keeper.

steps.text: Decide your next area: **Undead Burg** (recommended first) or **New Londo Ruins** (dangerous).
